title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) LICENSING CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAWIT , PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A REGULAR LICENSING CENTER TO BE KNOWN AS THE LTO CAVITE LICENSING CENTER OF KAWIT, CAVITE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
114 OG No. 38, 6598 (September 17, 2018); Manila Bulletin, September 6, 2018

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11065, August 23, 2018 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) LICENSING CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF KAWIT , PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A REGULAR LICENSING CENTER TO BE KNOWN AS THE LTO CAVITE LICENSING CENTER OF KAWIT, CAVITE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Land Transportation Office (LTO) Licensing Center in the Municipality of Kawit, Cavite is hereby converted into a Regular Licensing Center to be known as the LTO Cavite Licensing Center.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Transportation shall immediately include in the Department's programs of the operationalization of the LTO Cavite Licensing Center, the initial funding of which shall be charged against the current year's appropriations of the LTO Cavite Licensing Center. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for the continued implementation of this Act shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days following the completion of its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in two (2) national newspapers of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

PANTALEON D. ALVAREZ

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on October 9, 2017 and May 28, 2018,respectively.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

CESAR STRAIT PAREJA

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 23 2018

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Senate
